# CC4.Marketing — Full Course Reference

> This is the extended version of llms.txt with complete lesson details. For a concise overview, see: https://cc4.marketing/llms.txt

## Module 0: Getting Started (4 lessons, ~30 minutes)

### Lesson 0.0 — Introduction (10 min)
Path: /modules/0/introduction
Description: Welcome to Claude Code for Marketers. Learn what this course covers and how to get the most from it.
Objectives:
- Understand what Claude Code is and why it matters for marketers
- Learn the course structure and what you'll achieve
- Get excited about transforming your marketing workflow

### Lesson 0.1 — Installation (5 min)
Path: /modules/0/installation
Description: Install Claude Code on your machine using the 2025 native installer. No coding experience required.
Objectives:
- Download and install Claude Code
- Set up your Anthropic API key
- Verify the installation works

### Lesson 0.2 — Start & Clone (10 min)
Path: /modules/0/start-clone
Description: Launch Claude Code and clone the course materials to your local machine.
Objectives:
- Start Claude Code in your terminal
- Clone the Markit project
- Explore the project structure

### Lesson 0.3 — GitHub PR Workflow for Marketers (10 min)
Path: /modules/0/github-pr-guide
Description: A simple guide to creating, reviewing, and merging Pull Requests.
Objectives:
- Understand what a Pull Request (PR) is
- Learn how to create a PR on GitHub
- Communicate effectively with developers during review
- Know what to do after a PR is approved

---

## Module 1: Core Concepts (7 lessons, ~3-4 hours)

### Lesson 1.1 — Welcome to Markit (20 min)
Path: /modules/1/welcome
Description: Introduction to Markit, your hands-on marketing agency project for learning Claude Code.
Objectives:
- Understand the Markit project structure
- Learn about the Planerio product you'll be marketing
- Set up your first marketing project with Claude
- Create your first marketing file

### Lesson 1.2 — Working with Marketing Files (25 min)
Path: /modules/1/working-with-files
Description: Learn to organize, find, and manage marketing files efficiently with Claude Code.
Objectives:
- Structure marketing project folders effectively
- Create and organize marketing files
- Find files quickly with search
- Work with multiple files simultaneously

### Lesson 1.3 — First Marketing Tasks (30 min)
Path: /modules/1/first-tasks
Description: Complete real marketing tasks including multi-channel copy, competitive analysis, and content strategy.
Objectives:
- Generate on-brand marketing copy for multiple channels
- Conduct competitor research with Claude
- Create content strategies and calendars
- Use Claude for brainstorming and ideation

### Lesson 1.4 — Using Agents for Marketing (35 min)
Path: /modules/1/agents
Description: Learn to use agents for parallel workflows, multi-perspective feedback, and complex campaigns.
Objectives:
- Understand agents and when to use them
- Run parallel marketing workflows
- Get feedback from multiple perspectives
- Handle complex multi-step campaigns

### Lesson 1.5 — Custom Marketing Sub-Agents (30 min)
Path: /modules/1/custom-agents
Description: Create specialized marketing reviewers for brand voice, SEO, conversion, and quality control.
Objectives:
- Create custom marketing reviewer personas
- Build a brand voice guardian
- Create SEO and conversion optimization reviewers
- Maintain consistency across campaigns

### Lesson 1.6 — Project Memory for Marketing (20 min)
Path: /modules/1/project-memory
Description: Use CLAUDE.md to maintain consistent brand context across all your marketing work.
Objectives:
- Create a CLAUDE.md file for your marketing project
- Know what to include for maximum effectiveness
- Understand how Claude uses project memory
- Maintain consistency across all content

### Lesson 1.7 — Claude Code Navigation (20 min)
Path: /modules/1/navigation
Description: Master file operations, search techniques, and project organization for efficient marketing work.
Objectives:
- Learn quick file finding techniques
- Master advanced search patterns
- Perform batch operations on multiple files
- Apply project organization best practices

---

## Module 2: Advanced Applications (6 lessons, ~4-5 hours)

### Lesson 2.1 — Write a Campaign Brief (45 min)
Path: /modules/2/campaign-brief
Description: Create professional, comprehensive campaign briefs with multi-perspective feedback.
Objectives:
- Partner with Claude to create comprehensive campaign briefs
- Structure complex marketing documents
- Incorporate research and data into strategy
- Get multi-perspective feedback on your brief

### Lesson 2.2 — Develop Content Strategy (40 min)
Path: /modules/2/content-strategy
Description: Build data-driven content strategies with calendars, topic clusters, and multi-channel planning.
Objectives:
- Create data-driven content strategies
- Build comprehensive content calendars
- Master topic clustering and pillar content
- Plan multi-channel content distribution

### Lesson 2.3 — Generate Marketing Copy (35 min)
Path: /modules/2/marketing-copy
Description: Create high-converting copy at scale for every marketing channel.
Objectives:
- Write effective copy for each marketing channel
- Generate A/B test variations
- Apply copywriting frameworks
- Personalize content at scale

### Lesson 2.4 — Analyze Campaign Data (35 min)
Path: /modules/2/analytics
Description: Turn marketing data into actionable insights and executive reports.
Objectives:
- Analyze campaign performance data
- Create compelling executive reports
- Identify optimization opportunities
- Build data-driven recommendations

### Lesson 2.5 — Competitive Analysis (30 min)
Path: /modules/2/competitive-analysis
Description: Research competitors, analyze positioning, and identify strategic opportunities.
Objectives:
- Conduct comprehensive competitor analysis
- Analyze positioning and messaging
- Research competitive content strategy
- Identify competitive advantages

### Lesson 2.6 — SEO Optimization (40 min)
Path: /modules/2/seo-optimization
Description: Master search engine optimization with keyword research, content optimization, and technical SEO.
Objectives:
- Conduct comprehensive keyword research
- Optimize content for search engines
- Build pillar pages and topic clusters
- Understand technical SEO fundamentals

---

## Changelog API
- JSON: https://cc4-changelog.mtri-vo.workers.dev/api/changelog
- RSS: https://cc4-changelog.mtri-vo.workers.dev/rss.xml
- JSON Feed: https://cc4-changelog.mtri-vo.workers.dev/feed.json
